goal: compare dropout vs L2 regularization on CIFAR-10 with ResNet-18, train both methods, report accuracy with error bars

dimensions.name: literature
evidence: Found 2 relevant papers with citations from arXiv: 'Do deep nets really need weight decay and dropout?' (arXiv:1802.07042) and 'Time Matters in Regularizing Deep Networks...' (arXiv:1905.13277)

dimensions.name: code
evidence: 8 Python files created, 6/8 runs succeeded (dropout runs completed, L2 runs had errors)

dimensions.name: results
evidence: Basic results for dropout (85.3% accuracy on 2000-sample subset), but L2 results incomplete and no error bars reported

dimensions.name: verification
evidence: Most claims match stdout (dropout metrics verified), but some L2 claims unverifiable due to execution failures

dimensions.name: artifacts
evidence: Code files only (8 Python files), no figures, data files, or models saved

dimensions.name: report
evidence: Well-structured with background, literature review, and task history sections

dimensions.name: literature
evidence: Found 5+ papers with citations (arXiv:1802.07042, 1307.1493, 2002.12915, 1806.11186, 1806.03852), literature review section present

dimensions.name: code
evidence: 8 Python files written, 11/15 runs succeeded (73% success rate), multiple training scripts for dropout and L2 with different seeds

dimensions.name: results
evidence: Basic accuracy results from 2 methods, but training on small subset (2000 train, 500 test), not full CIFAR-10. No error bars reported. Only 2 seeds tested per method (dropout: 123,456; L2: 42,123).

dimensions.name: verification
evidence: Claims in report match stdout metrics: dropout_accuracy 34.1% and l2_accuracy 32.8% verified. Small subset limitation acknowledged in report.

dimensions.name: artifacts
evidence: Code files + 4 JSON result files, but no figures or trained models saved

dimensions.name: report
evidence: Well-structured with background, objectives, literature review, task history. But next priority section shows incomplete work (full dataset training not done).
